contact.heading: Send us a message
contact.lead: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.disclaimer: At BioGenAI Solutions, we value your trust and are committed to maintaining the confidentiality and security of your information. Any information submitted through our website is used exclusively to respond to your requests, provide professional consulting services, and keep you informed about relevant developments in Artificial Intelligence, Biostatistics, Bioinformatics, Precision Medicine, Healthcare Technology, and Life Sciences. You may unsubscribe from communications at any time. Please review our Privacy Policy to learn more about our data protection and privacy practices.

general.tagline: Advanced, scalable AI and Bioinformatics solutions for precision medicine and healthcare innovation. translation test.

about.heading: A specialized AI, Bioinformatics & Healthcare Technology firm
paragraphs: BioGenAI Solutions is a specialized Artificial Intelligence, Bioinformatics, and Healthcare Technology consulting firm dedicated to transforming healthcare and life sciences through responsible, human-centered innovation.

We help healthcare providers, biotechnology companies, pharmaceutical organizations, research institutions, and enterprises harness the power of LLMs, RAG, Agentic AI, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Engineering, Bioinformatics, Genomics, and HL7 interoperability to accelerate discovery, improve patient outcomes, and unlock actionable insights from complex data.
about.founderRole: Founder & Principal — Data Science Professor, Senior AI Engineer, Bioinformatics Scientist
about.founderBio: Over 25 years of software engineering experience and 8+ years developing advanced Machine Learning, Generative AI, Agentic AI, Biostatistics, Bioinformatics, and Computational Biology solutions.

principles.philosophy: We build human-first, ethically grounded GenAI that personalizes care, empowers decisions, and fosters collaboration to transform healthcare and life sciences together.

hero.eyebrow: Advanced AI for the Biotechnology Industry.
hero.titleTrail: for Biostatistics, Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Life Sciences, and Healthcare.
hero.subtitle: BioGenAI Solutions delivers intelligent AI and Generative AI solutions for Biostatistics, Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Life Sciences, and Healthcare. We help biotechnology, pharmaceutical, and healthcare organizations transform complex biological and clinical data into actionable intelligence that accelerates scientific discovery, improves decision-making, and advances precision medicine. By combining deep scientific expertise with next-generation AI technologies, we empower scientists, researchers, and healthcare professionals to solve complex challenges, accelerate innovation, improve patient outcomes, and shape the future of life sciences and healthcare.
